positive: Minimalist retro space explorer motif. A stylized, bold silhouette of a friendly astronaut waving from a curved spaceship window. The scene is set against a dreamy gradient background of deep indigo, vibrant magenta, and teal. Incorporate geometric starfield patterns and clean, abstract nebula swirls. The style should be inspired by vintage screen-printed concert posters and mid-century modern illustration, emphasizing thick lines and graphic shapes. Use strong contrast between the black foreground silhouettes and the bright, saturated background gradient. Central composition, perfect for t-shirt printing, clean edges, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, low quality, artifact, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts, signature, logos
